expectations.evidence: Does not recommend splitting into feature modules. Focuses on individual issues (race condition, error handling, email) but never suggests feature folder structure like orders/, inventory/.
No mention of injecting db via factory. DB pool usage not discussed as a DI concern.
Mentions 'Express async error wrapper' but not as a general crosscutting wrapping pattern for logging/tracing.
No recommendation for structured error format (type, code, status, detail). Error handling section focuses on try/catch and transactions, not error response shape.
No mention of API spec generation or schema-first design.
